name: Protection
tagline: Ward yourself and allies from harm.

baseAbility.name: Aegis / Ward
baseAbility.description: Standard action, 0 SP. Aegis: touch a creature to grant it a themed defensive bonus (you start with Deflection, +1 deflection AC scaling with CL); lasts while you concentrate, or 1 SP for 1 hr/CL. Ward: create a stationary warded zone centered on you (you start with Barrier, a transparent wall of force at its perimeter); lasts while you concentrate, or 1 SP for 1 min/CL. Additional (aegis) and (ward) talents unlock more options; (succor) talents let you sacrifice an active aegis for a burst effect.

talents.name: Resistance (aegis)
talents.description: New aegis: a resistance bonus to all saving throws.

talents.name: Spell Ward (aegis, ward)
talents.description: New aegis/ward: force a magic skill check from casters attempting to affect the protected creature/area, potentially suppressing hostile magic.

talents.name: Elemental Resistance (aegis, ward)
talents.description: New aegis/ward: grant energy resistance to a chosen energy type, or suppress that damage type within a warded area.

talents.name: Deathless (aegis)
talents.description: New aegis: bonus on saves against death effects and negative energy, with a save even when one wouldn't normally be allowed.

talents.name: Guardian (aegis)
talents.description: New aegis: draws hostile attention toward the bearer and away from allies.

talents.name: Obscurity (aegis, ward)
talents.description: New aegis/ward: protected creatures are easy to overlook, forcing a Will save before they're noticed.

talents.name: Denying Ground (aegis, ward)
talents.description: New aegis/ward: makes it difficult for creatures to approach or enter the protected area without a Will save.

talents.name: Rescue (succor)
talents.description: New succor: sacrifice an active aegis on a creature as an immediate action to grant it evasion and stalwart until the end of the current turn.

talents.name: Mass Aegis
talents.description: Apply the same aegis to 1 extra target per 2 CL (min 1) at once.

talents.name: Expanded Protection
talents.description: Learn an additional (aegis) or (ward) talent immediately.
